# Data Visualization Best Practices

## Why Visualize Data?

- Humans process visual information faster than text
- Patterns become obvious in charts that hide in tables
- Good visualizations tell a story

## Chart Types

- Bar charts for comparisons
- Line charts for trends over time
- Scatter plots for relationships between variables
- Pie charts for parts of a whole (use sparingly)

## Design Principles

- Start with the data, not the decoration
- Use color intentionally
- Label everything clearly
- Remove chart junk
